config.content.title: Delivery Policy
config.content.body: Our platform primarily offers digital services. Access is granted electronically upon successful registration or purchase. No physical shipping is involved for digital access.
config.toc.items:
Digital Products & Services|Our platform primarily offers digital services. Access is granted electronically upon successful registration or purchase. No physical shipping is involved for digital access.
Physical Goods (If Applicable)|If we offer physical goods, shipping times and methods will be stated at checkout. Delivery times are estimates and may vary.
Delivery and Access|You are responsible for providing accurate contact and delivery information. We are not liable for delays or failures due to incorrect information or circumstances beyond our control.
International Users|Availability and delivery options may vary by region. Restrictions may apply in certain jurisdictions.

notes: 配送政策页面布局，继承首页头尾
